title: End-to-end intake, generated strategy persistence, approval and calendar materialization

executionProfile.why: Cross-cutting product correction spanning intake UX, API contracts, strict structured generation, persistence, transactional activation, timezone scheduling, tenant isolation and regression tests.

operatorAuthorization.scope: All official Oreshnik control-plane operations needed to inject, dispatch, resume, reconcile, repair, validate and deliver this Goal are authorized.

hardStops: No credentials or API keys in Git, logs, fixtures or screenshots.
No Prisma schema, authentication or authorization model change without an explicit Oreshnik double lock and documented necessity.
Do not bypass Oreshnik or fabricate a Run, claim, assignment, evidence or terminal state. Official Oreshnik control-plane mutations authorized by the human owner are allowed.
startupContract: Read AGENTS.md, the goal document and the operator authorization document.
Inspect the installed Oreshnik inject, align, dispatch, goal and recovery or administration help.
Register this request canonically and use the authorized Oreshnik control-plane operations required to resolve internal blockers.
Invoke oreshnik goal --harness codex --repo . --json so Oreshnik resolves operator, instance, session and exact resumable or new Run.
Implement only inside the assigned worktree and zones returned by Oreshnik.
